title: Make RepoBrief provenance and refresh current
goal: Make RepoBrief freshness determinable by requiring source commit and dirty-state provenance, separating stale legacy registry rows and adding merge-bound refresh plus bounded catch-up behavior.

acceptance.assertion: New bundles record source repository identity, exact commit, dirty state, generated time and generator identity; missing source provenance is a visible degraded state rather than silently unknown freshness.
Missing legacy bundle rows are removed from the live latest-complete authority or exposed in a separate historical/invalid section that cannot satisfy context selection.
A debounced post-merge or source-head change trigger refreshes only the affected repository and does not operate in active dirty worktrees.
A bounded periodic catch-up identifies missing or stale bundles and refreshes them with resource leases, timeouts and per-repository receipts rather than regenerating all bundles blindly.
Grabowski context packs can distinguish fresh_exact, stale_head, fresh_dirty_unverified and unknown states against live repository heads.

metadata.live_gap: Current context packs work, but bundles without source commit yield freshness unknown and the registry still reports missing legacy rows.
